topic: There is a washed dish in my sink every morning but I eat out every night
title: There Is a Clean Dish in My Sink Every Morning. I Eat Out Every Night. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is one dish in my sink every morning. Washed, set to dry. I eat out every single night.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single clean white plate resting in a kitchen dish rack, water droplets on it, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone above a diner. I have not cooked in this kitchen once.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small tidy apartment kitchen at night, spotless counters, a window overlooking a diner sign, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of an empty clean kitchen sink and counter, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning a single white plate sat in the rack, still damp.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a damp white plate in a dish rack, faint water beneath, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I did not own that plate.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a plain white plate held in a hand, an unfamiliar pattern, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A fork beside it. A glass with a lip print that was not mine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a fork and a drinking glass with a faint lip print in a dish rack, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of an emptied dish rack, bare and dry, on a kitchen counter, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next dawn, one plate, damp, warm crumbs left in the drain.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single damp plate with warm crumbs near a sink drain, faint steam, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each morning the meal is bigger. Two plates. Then a setting for a whole family.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a place setting for several people drying in a rack, multiple plates and forks, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I heard cutlery and quiet talking through the kitchen wall. The kitchen was empty.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty kitchen at night, a table set as if for a meal, no people, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I shut the water off at the main and taped the tap.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a kitchen tap wrapped in tape with the water valve shut, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the dishes were done anyway. The towel was wet. Someone had wrung it out.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a damp wrung dish towel draped over a sink edge, clean dishes in the rack, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
